description: Individual radio button option, typically used inside TmRadioGroup. Supports label, checked state, disabled state, and a select callback.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The value this radio represents — used by TmRadioGroup.

parameters.name: IsChecked
parameters.description: Whether this radio is currently selected.

parameters.name: OnSelect
parameters.description: Fires when this radio is selected.

examples.title: Standalone radio
examples.code: <TmRadio Name="color" Value="@("red")" Label="Red" IsChecked="@(selectedColor == "red")" OnSelect="@(() => selectedColor = "red")" />
